address: 509 N Carrollton Ave, 4105 Saint Louis St
description: Emergency structural strengthening of the building brick walls, facades, interior walls, cracks mitigation, steel framing, new concrete footings to support the steel framing, fenestration change due to the failed lintels, and tie backs to distribute movement of the building. The roof repair to be done after with a new permit. The set of drawings attached indicate a survey of the building after hurricane Ida showing multiple and critical condition of the structural envelope of the building. The collapsed corners and lintel brick work was repaired and the steel supports were installed to prevent further deterioration. The contractors involved were Aubrey Howard Bricks and Masonry Products with the steel subcontractor. General Contractor will be submitted later. The Owner: Mr. Joseph J. Fertitta is the applicant to provide costs as per executed emergency construction work (527 At. Joseph St, New Orleans, La 70130).
